title: PageChunkAnchorLookupQuery
description: Input query schema for Use Case 1: Page/Chunk Anchor Lookup. Given a document_id and page_range, return index records whose page_anchor falls within the range.

document_id.description: Document identifier from P94 promoted index (e.g., tsa23_2012_23tsdp12). Must match a value present in the target corpus.

page_range.description: Inclusive page range for filtering results.

end.description: Ending page number (inclusive). Must be >= start.

include_source_hashes.description: Whether to include source_hash fields in output records.

include_model_lane.description: Whether to include model_lane field in output records.
